'''''Adamantine''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] escort [[Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] used at [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. All hands were lost and the ship destroyed when the [[Death Seed]] plague was released. Its crew included [[Koth Barak]] and [[Gallie Wover]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
